div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Static review findings and release-hardening targets\nComment: These are improvement areas, not blockers already solved.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Native, deployment, and resource efficiency\nComment: Python remains authoritative; native paths are optional accelerators.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Providers, tools, workflows, and teams\nComment: Domain behavior should use these extension surfaces instead of bloating core abstractions.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Core, storage, state, and code intelligence\nComment: Keep project-specific derived state out of the global user database.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SDK-first plugin and vertical ecosystem\nComment: Plugin is the bootstrap seam; vertical is the domain configuration role.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Canonical runtime services\nComment: These own effectful runtime behavior. New production paths should route here.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Agent runtime internals\nComment: Service-first target state; orchestrator is a composition root, not a business-logic owner.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Framework layer: reusable public abstractions\nComment: Put reusable APIs here only when multiple surfaces need them.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Interface and application surfaces\nComment: Surfaces should compose framework capabilities, not own orchestration logic.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Users and consumers\nComment: Victor supports CLI users, Python API users, services, MCP clients, and plugin authors.

span.p: move stable contracts upward

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: refactor toward services/contracts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: clarify ownership and package naming

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: reduce direct internal imports

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: keep out of source truth

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: fail-soft resource policy

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Developer / operator\nComment: Uses Victor as a local or cloud-backed agentic runtime.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Python application\nComment: Imports victor.framework.Agent, StateGraph, ToolSet, and public SDK contracts.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: External tool client\nComment: MCP, HTTP, or automation client calling Victor as a service.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Plugin author\nComment: Builds a sibling victor-* package against victor-sdk first.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/ui + victor/commands\nCLI, TUI, slash commands\nComment: Should enter through VictorClient / Agent.create / SessionConfig.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/integrations/api\nHTTP API and observability routes\nComment: Service surface for automation and dashboards.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/integrations/mcp\nMCP server\nComment: Tool/protocol bridge for external agent clients.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor.framework public API\nAgent, ToolSet, StateGraph, WorkflowEngine\nComment: Stable user-facing Python contract.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ui/, web/ui/, vscode-victor/\nComment: Separate npm projects; keep package-lock files scoped to each subtree.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Agent facade and AgentBuilder\nComment: Public run(), stream(), chat(), run_workflow(), run_team().

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: StateGraph execution engine\nComment: Canonical graph engine for workflows and teams; no separate multi-agent graph.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: WorkflowEngine + YAML DSL\nComment: Compiles declarative workflows into StateGraph nodes and edges.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Tool registry and ToolSet presets\nComment: User-visible tool selection surface; delegates execution to agent services.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Structured events\nComment: THINKING, TOOL_CALL, TOOL_RESULT, CONTENT, ERROR, STREAM_END with correlation IDs.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: framework.extensions\nComment: Public extension contract for plugins that need framework hooks without importing internals.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: UnifiedPromptPipeline\nComment: Owns GEPA, MiPROv2, CoT distillation, credit guidance, and stable prompt sections.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: AgentOrchestrator\nComment: Compatibility and composition root; shrink over time by moving effectful logic to services.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: AgenticLoop\nPERCEIVE → PLAN → ACT → EVALUATE → DECIDE\nComment: Canonical chat iteration authority; StateGraph executor is optional inner implementation.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ToolPipeline\nComment: Retry, cache, middleware, access policy, batching, and streaming execution.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Decision services and classifiers\nComment: Edge micro-decisions, tool necessity, task classification, coordination recommendations.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Conversation and context assembly\nComment: Budgeting, pruning, scoring, compaction, and project memory integration.

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Recovery and resilience\nComment: Error classifiers and recovery handlers for shell, graph DB, provider, and tool failures.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ChatService\nComment: Owns chat turn execution through adapters/pipelines.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ToolService\nComment: Owns tool access, budgets, stage filtering, execution stats, and runtime policy.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SessionService\nComment: Canonical session owner; SessionFacade is compatibility only.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ContextService\nComment: Owns context windows, compaction, prompt/context assembly seams.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ProviderService\nComment: Owns provider routing, resilience, fallback, rate-limit suppression.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: RecoveryService\nComment: Owns structured recovery decisions and retry strategy.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: RuntimeIntelligenceService\nComment: Feeds prompt optimization, task intelligence, and execution learning.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-sdk\nVerticalBase, VictorPlugin, PluginContext, capabilities\nComment: Definition-layer contract; external packages should import this first.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor.plugins entry point\nComment: Canonical discovery. Plugin.register(context) registers verticals and capabilities.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: legacy victor.verticals / in-repo contrib\nComment: Compatibility only; do not add new production behavior here.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-registry\nComment: Marketplace/index metadata; not a runtime source of truth.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-coding\nComment: Codebase analysis, editing, testing, review, language tooling.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-devops\nComment: Infrastructure, CI/CD, container, cloud operations.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-rag\nComment: Retrieval, ingestion, hybrid search, grounded answers.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-dataanalysis\nComment: Dataframes, statistics, cleaning, visualization workflows.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-research\nComment: Research, source handling, synthesis, fact checking.

div.style: color: rgb(30, 27, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor-invest\nComment: Investment research platform and large standalone app/plugin hybrid.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/core\nDI, events, CQRS, vertical loader, database accessors\nComment: Infrastructure layer, not a domain dumping ground.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Global DB: ~/.victor/victor.db\nComment: Settings, API keys, profiles, RL outcomes, tool/model preferences, cross-project patterns.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Project DB: ./.victor/project.db\nComment: Graph nodes/edges, conversations, project sessions, entity memory, change tracking.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Graph and indexing services\nComment: CodebaseIndexFactory, file watcher, symbols, CCG, incremental rebuilds.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Vector stores / embeddings\nComment: LanceDB and embedding services are optional; degrade gracefully when absent.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: codebase verification tool\nComment: Semantic claim validation, docs cross-reference, false-positive detection, severity, temporal analysis.

div.style: color: rgb(59, 7, 100) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: observability + tracing\nComment: QueryService, events, metrics, dashboards, telemetry, debouncing.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/providers\nComment: Cloud and local LLM adapters, circuit breakers, retries, rate-limit suppression.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/tools\nComment: Filesystem, git, shell, search, graph, verification, Docker, testing, refactoring.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/workflows\nComment: DSL compiler, executors, handlers, HITL, resilience, credentials.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/teams\nUnifiedTeamCoordinator\nComment: Teams are formations inside StateGraph, not separate graph engines.

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: victor/security\nComment: Safety, secrets, auth, audit, infrastructure checks.

div.style: color: rgb(69, 10, 10) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: rust/ crates\nprotocol, state, tools, edge-runtime, python-bindings\nComment: Performance hot paths through PyO3 with Python fallback.

div.style: color: rgb(59, 7, 100) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Local model runtimes\nOllama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM\nComment: KV prefix caching and air-gapped operation; avoid unnecessary cloud calls.

div.style: color: rgb(59, 7, 100) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cloud model providers\nAnthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Bedrock, Vertex, etc.\nComment: API prompt caching where supported; provider-specific resilience.

div.style: color: rgb(59, 7, 100) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Deployment surfaces\nCLI, Docker, HTTP API, MCP, VS Code, Python library\nComment: Choose smallest surface for workload; avoid always-on heavy services by default.

div.style: color: rgb(59, 7, 100) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: CacheRegistry and runtime caches\nComment: Category invalidation, session prompt caching, semantic response cache, vector/index caches.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Large modules remain\nComment: orchestrator.py, conversation/store.py, code_search_tool.py, graph_tool.py, tool_pipeline.py exceed healthy module size.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Generic duplicate modules\nComment: many base.py, registry.py, protocols.py, context.py names make ownership harder to navigate.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Layering leaks\nComment: framework/tools/ui still import selected victor.agent internals; migrate stable contracts upward.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Generated/runtime state risk\nComment: .victor, dist, build, caches, indexes must stay out of source-of-truth docs and releases.

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Optional dependency pressure\nComment: embeddings, LanceDB, native Rust, aiosqlite, browser/frontends should fail soft unless explicitly selected.
